faq_description: Unemibuzo ngokwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ebhizinisini lakho?
faq_s1_c1: I-Bitcoin izinto ezimbili: imali yedijithali nenethiwekhi yekhompyutha.
faq_s1_c2: Ungathumela i-bitcoin (imali yedijithali) ngqo kwabanye abantu usebenzisa i-Bitcoin Network.
faq_s1_c3: I-Bitcoin Network ikwazi ukusebenza ngaphandle kwabaphakathi noma iziphathimandla eziyinhloko, njengamabhange noma izinkampani zamakhadi esikweletu, ngakho ungagwema izimali zazo zokwenza umsebenzi.
faq_s1_c4: Izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin zifinyelela ukukhokhelwa kokugcina ngokushesha (imizuzu engu-10) futhi azikwazi ukubuyiswa, ngakho ungalala ngokuthula wazi ukuthi imali yakho iyimali yakho.
faq_s2_c1: I-Bitcoin ikuvumela ukwamukela izinkokhelo ngezimali eziphansi futhi uthole amakhasimende amaningi. Izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin zinezimali eziphansi ngaphandle kwezingakanani ezincane, zikhokhelwa ngokushesha, futhi azithinteki ukubuyiswa kwemali noma ukukhohliswa.
faq_s2_c2: Ukwamukela i-Bitcoin kumahhala futhi kukuvumela ukufaka ibhizinisi lakho kumabalazwe abathengisi be-Bitcoin ukuze abasebenzisi be-Bitcoin bakwazi ukuthola ibhizinisi lakho kalula.
faq_s2_c3: Bona zonke izindlela i-Bitcoin enhle ngayo ebhizinisini.
faq_s3_c1: Okudingayo nje ukwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin yisikhwama se-Bitcoin samahhala.
faq_s3_c2: Umhlahlandlela wethu wesikhwama uzokusiza ngokushesha nokulula ukuze uvule izinzuzo zokwamukela i-Bitcoin namuhla!
faq_s4: Ngingaguqula izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin engizitholayo zibe yimali yendawo yami?
faq_s4_c1: Yebo! Ngokusebenzisa isikhwama esihlangene, ungaguqula ngokuzenzakalelayo izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ozitholayo zibe yimali yakho yendawo ngokushesha lapho inkokhelo itholakala.
faq_s4_c2: Umhlahlandlela wethu wesikhwama ungakusiza ngokushesha nokulula.
faq_s4_c3: Ungakhetha futhi ukugcina ingxenye yezinkokhelo ozitholayo njengo-Bitcoin. Ukonga nge-Bitcoin kunezinzuzo eziningi:
faq_s4_c6: Lezi zinzuzo zenza i-Bitcoin ibe yindlela enhle yokugcina imali isikhathi eside.
faq_s4_c7: Ngisho noma ukhetha ukuguqula zonke izinkokhelo zakho ze-Bitcoin zibe yimadola, usathola izinzuzo zokwamukela izinkokhelo ngezimali eziphansi kakhulu ngenkathi ufinyelela amakhasimende amaningi angaba khona.
faq_s5_c1: Yebo! Kulula ukwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ngokuqondile usebenzisa isikhwama se-Bitcoin.
faq_s5_c2: Umhlahlandlela wethu wesikhwama ungakusiza ukukhetha isikhwama se-Bitcoin esikahle kakhulu ebhizinisini lakho.
faq_s6_c1: Yebo! Kulula ukwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ku-inthanethi nesitolo sakho saku-inthanethi esikhona.
faq_s6_c2: Bheka umhlahlandlela wethu wesikhwama ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe.
faq_s7: Ngingabazisa kanjani amakhasimende ami ukuthi ngiyamukela i-Bitcoin?
faq_s7_c1: Sinikeza izitika zamahhala ze-'Bitcoin Accepted Here' ongaziveza ebhizinisini lakho ukuze umazise amakhasimende akho ukuthi uyamukela i-Bitcoin.
faq_s7_c2: Chofoza lapha ukuze ucele izitika zakho.
faq_s7_c3: Ungakwazi futhi ukufaka ibhizinisi lakho kumabalazwe abathengisi be-Bitcoin mahhala futhi uthole ukuvezwa ezigidini zabasebenzisi be-Bitcoin abafuna ukusebenzisa i-Bitcoin yabo emabhizinisini ayamukelayo.
faq_s8: Ngingathola kanjani amakhasimende amaningi ngokwamukela i-Bitcoin?
faq_s8_c1: Kunesigidi sabasebenzisi be-Bitcoin abafuna ukusebenzisa i-Bitcoin yabo emabhizinisini ayamukelayo.
faq_s8_c2: Ngokumane wamukele izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin, ibhizinisi lakho lingafakwa kumabalazwe abathengisi be-Bitcoin mahhala futhi likunike ukuvezwa kumakhasimende amasha angaba khona.
faq_s9_c1: Ukwamukela i-Bitcoin ebhizinisini lakho kumahhala ngokuphelele. Azikho izinkontileka noma izimali ezifihliwe.
faq_s9_c2: Bheka umhlahlandlela wethu wesikhwama ukuze uqale ukwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin namuhla.
